variants: Samira Arshad is an accomplished inventor known for her creation of the Ivorygate Logic Relay, a significant advancement in information processing technology. Originally from Jetmarsh Outpost, she now resides in Shorepine Fields, where she continues to innovate. Her contributions to her field earned her the renowned Phoenix Pearl Insignia, highlighting her impact. In addition to her technological work, Samira is a member of the Driftglow Painters Consortium, engaging deeply with her artistic pursuits. Through her diverse talents, she inspires those around her with her creative vision.
